<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>

<li>pulmonary hypertension（99.0%）</li>

<li>kyphoscoliotic heart disease（98.8%）</li>
<li>headache disorder（98.8%）</li>
<li>trigeminal autonomic cephalalgia（98.7%）</li>
<li>Raynaud disease（98.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
